body:
## Rationale
`far-beyond-driven-drum-setup` is **ABSENT** from `albumArticles.js` (130 articles, verified). Pantera's third major-label album:
- **#1 Billboard 200 debut** — the only metal album to chart #1 in 1994
- Vinnie Paul's heaviest era — Pearl Reference Pure kit, Steel Cobra double pedals
- Distinct gear era from Cowboys from Hell (Pearl Export era) and VDoP (upgraded hardware)
- High search TAM: Pantera resurgence + Vinnie Paul memorial queries drive sustained interest

## Arc context
- Cowboys from Hell ✅ in albumArticles
- Vulgar Display of Power ✅ in albumArticles  
- **Far Beyond Driven** ✗ (THIS article — 1994)
- Great Southern Trendkill → in ai-fix
- Reinventing the Steel → proposal in idea bank

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add `far-beyond-driven-drum-setup` entry
- `public/llms/articles/far-beyond-driven-drum-setup.md` — LLM companion file

## Data shape
```json
{
  "slug": "far-beyond-driven-drum-setup",
  "albumTitle": "Far Beyond Driven",
  "drummer": "Vinnie Paul",
  "band": "Pantera",
  "year": 1994,
  "genre": "Groove Metal",
  "relatedAlbums": ["vulgar-display-of-power-drum-setup", "cowboys-from-hell-drum-setup"]
}
```

## Gear angle
Pearl Reference Pure shells, DW 9000 + Steel Cobra double pedal (transitional era), Zildjian Z Custom crashes — heavier/louder setup than Cowboys era. "Walk" / "5 Minutes Alone" / "I'm Broken" — studio compression + attack details are highly searchable.

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words, ≥3 FAQs, ≥3 internal links, Person + MusicAlbum JSON-LD schema
- FAQ targets: "what drums did vinnie paul use on far beyond driven", "what pedals did vinnie paul use 1994"

## Verify
1. `/articles/far-beyond-driven-drum-setup` returns 200 with Vinnie Paul content
2. JSON-LD `MusicAlbum` schema visible in page source
3. `curl metalforge.io/sitemap.xml | grep far-beyond-driven` returns URL
4. `/llms/articles/far-beyond-driven-drum-setup.md` returns 200
5. Internal links to cowboys-from-hell and vulgar-display-of-power articles

## Done
Article added to albumArticles.js, LLM companion created at public/llms/articles/, sitemap auto-updates.
title: SEO: Pantera 'Far Beyond Driven' drum setup article (Vinnie Paul, 1994 — #1 Billboard 200, completes Cowboys→VDoP→FBD trilogy)
